/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Hotel_Management_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Booking/Booking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Booking/BookingFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Booking/BookingRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/CMakeFiles/3.25.2/CompilerIdCXX/CMakeCXXCompilerId.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Customer/Customer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Customer/CustomerRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Customer/MembershipPolicy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Manager/BillingService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Manager/DashboardService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Manager/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Manager/InvoiceRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Observer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Room/DerivedRooms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Room/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Room/RoomRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Service/ServiceItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/Service/ServiceItemRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Hotel_Management.dir/main.cpp.o -o Hotel_Management -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
